positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical graphic design of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) merging with minimalist nature elements. The fox should have a powerful, elegant silhouette with flowing, watercolor-inspired tails and features. It is surrounded by stylized constellations, glowing crescent moons, and abstract, swirling floral patterns (e.g., lotuses, ferns). The overall composition must be centered and suitable for screen printing on apparel, featuring strong black outlines, rich jewel tones (deep sapphire, emerald, amethyst), and an ethereal, mythical vibe. High contrast, clean lines, graphic novel aesthetic meets Japanese art deco.
negative: low detail, blurry, bad anatomy, watermark, text, signature, logo, artifacts, noisy, ugly, extra limbs, copyright, celebrity, bokeh, grain
